2606.20758.title: A Topology-Aware, Memory-Centric Architecture that Separates Root-Cause Derivation from Root-Cause Explanation
2606.20758.paper_summary: Modern microservice deployments fail in ways that are easy to detect and hard to explain. When a fault propagates along service dependencies, alerts fire in floods, dashboards multiply, and the scarce resource, an engineer who understands how the services relate, is consumed reconstructing context that the monitoring stack discarded. We argue that the missing ingredient in autonomous operations is not a better anomaly detector or a larger language model, but operational memory: a persistent, structured representation of how a system normally behaves, how its parts depend on one another, and how it has failed before. We present O PS C ORTEX, a working multi-agent prototype that organizes this memory into four tiers and uses it to separate two tasks the field usually conflates: deriving a root cause and explaining it. Root cause is computed deterministically from a learned dependency graph and the temporal ordering of threshold crossings; a large language model (LLM) is then asked only to explain, confirm, and recommend, using evidence the system has already assembled. We motivate the design with two documented production cascading failures, review representative literature on observability, anomaly detection, graph-based localization, and LLM-assisted diagnosis, and show how each architectural choice maps directly to a failure mode those incidents exhibit. The prototype is validated on an instrumented e-commerce benchmark with eight injectable failure scenarios.
2606.20758.paper_summary_zh: 現代微服務部署的失敗方式易於檢測但難以解釋。當故障沿著服務依賴關係傳播時，警報如洪水般觸發，儀表板數量激增，而理解服務之間關係的稀缺資源——工程師，則被消耗於重建監控堆棧所丟棄的上下文。我們主張，自主操作中缺失的成分不是更好的異常檢測器或更大的語言模型，而是操作記憶：一種持久的、結構化的系統正常行為的表徵，系統各部分之間的依賴關係，以及過去的失敗情況。我們提出了O PS C ORTEX，一個運行中的多代理原型，將這種記憶組織成四個層級，並利用它來區分兩個通常被混淆的任務：推導根本原因和解釋根本原因。根本原因是根據學習到的依賴圖和閾值穿越的時間順序確定的；然後，大型語言模型（LLM）僅被要求解釋、確認和推薦，使用系統已經組裝的證據。我們用兩個記錄的生產級級聯故障來激勵設計，回顧有關可觀察性、異常檢測、基於圖的定位和LLM輔助診斷的代表性文獻，並展示每個架構選擇如何直接映射到這些事件所表現出的失敗模式。該原型在一個帶有八個可注入故障場景的儀器化電子商務基準上進行了驗證。
2606.20758.author: Momil Seedat et.al.
